questions.text: Which description best matches Scalable architecture design in AWS Solutions Architect Associate Domain 2.0 Design Resilient Architectures?

Vertical scaling increases capacity by using a larger or more powerful resource.
Loosely coupled architecture reduces direct dependencies between components so failures, scaling, or changes in one component have less impact on others.
